assertions.description: The window.shape or equivalent property exists for controlling window shape.
assertions.test: (()=>{return 'shape' in window || 'windowShape' in window || (window.navigator && 'windowShape' in window.navigator)})()

assertions.description: Window shape can be set to a rectangle or polygon for non-rectangular windows.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{if('shape' in window){const old=window.shape;return true}return false}catch(e){return false}})()

assertions.description: Window shape can be cleared/reset to the default rectangular shape.
A minimum window size constraint can be specified alongside the shape.
assertions.test: (()=>{try{return 'minWidth' in window || 'minimumSize' in window || 'shape' in window}catch(e){return false}})()
